title: llpsw Zombie
description: Do you want a wall of zombies?
body:
# 你想要《僵尸世界大战》电影那样的丧尸堆叠效果吗？[Do you want a zombie stacking effect like in the World War Z movies?]
1. 进入第二阶段后，如果你尝试站在高处，那么丧尸会踩着同伴的头向上攀爬，并最终堆叠在一起[After entering the second stage, if you try to stand on a high place, then the zombie will climb up on the head of a companion and end up stacking on top of each other]
2. 当矿工丧尸挖掘方块时，你可以在副手装备对应物品，右键鼠标修复该方块，可以使用配置文件指定方块与对应修复材料[When a miner zombie digs a block, you can equip the corresponding item on the off-hand, right-click the mouse to repair the block, and use the configuration file to specify the block and the corresponding repair material]
3. 模组提供了多种配置选项来控制难度[Mods offer a variety of configuration options to control the difficulty]
4. 随着游戏天数的进行，灾难的阶段将会逐渐提升，并且开始生成不同类型的丧尸[As the game progresses, the stage of the disaster will gradually increase, and different types of zombies will begin to spawn]
5. 模组提供了普通丧尸、奔跑丧尸、强壮丧尸、进化丧尸、只有一半身体的会搬运玩家的丧尸、搭建丧尸、矿工丧尸[The mod provides normal zombies, running zombies, strong zombies, evolutionary zombies, zombies that can carry players with only half of their bodies, building zombies, and miner zombies]
6. 模组提供了尸潮，会在玩家附近生成大量丧尸[The mod provides a wave of corpses that spawns a large number of zombies near the player]
7. 请使用光源方块避免丧尸生成在你的家里，哈哈哈哈[Please use light source blocks to prevent zombies from spawning in your home, hahahaha]
### **模组使用GeckoLib作为前置(Module uses GeckoLib as dependency)**
